content: GitHub Actions workflow_call: define on.workflow_call.inputs (type: string|boolean|number, required) and on.workflow_call.secrets (required). Call cross-repo: uses: {owner}/{repo}/.github/workflows/{file}@{ref}. Pass inputs via with: and secrets via secrets:. For same-org secrets inheritance use secrets: inherit. container: directive on a job runs all steps inside the image: image: ghcr.io/owner/image; volumes: and env: supported. actions/upload-artifact current major version is v4 (latest v4.6.2 stable; v7 also exists but is very new). Reusable workflow must be in a public repo or same org for cross-repo calls.
